message:
feat(web): Implement public status page and incident management

Add public status page with:
- /status - Main status page showing component health
- /status/history - Incident history page
- /api/status - Public status API with quick/full modes
- /api/status/incidents - Public incidents API
- /api/admin/incidents - Admin incident management API

Features:
- Real-time component status from health checks
- Active incident display with timeline
- Scheduled maintenance announcements
- Incident statistics and history
- In-memory incident store (like other stores)

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-oyg6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+

+ {incident.affectedComponents.length > 0 && ( +
+ Affected:{" "} + {incident.affectedComponents.join(", ")} +

Timeline
